page.title: Template:R from more specific geographic name

revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific geographic name |name=From a more specific geographic name |from=a geographic location that usually includes extraneous identifiers such as the ''county'' or ''region'' of a city |info=These redirects are mainly used to conform to Wikipedia conventions on [[WP:PLACE|geographic location article titles]]. |main category=Redirects from more specific geographic names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific geographic name |name=From a more specific geographic name |from=a geographic location that usually includes extraneous identifiers such as the ''county'' or ''region'' of a city |info=These redirects are mainly used to conform to Wikipedia conventions on [[WP:PLACE|geographic location article titles]]. |main category=Redirects from more specific geographic names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific geographic name |name=From a more specific geographic name |from=a geographic location that usually includes extraneous identifiers such as the ''county'' or ''region'' of a city |info=These redirects are mainly used to conform to Wikipedia conventions on [[WP:PLACE|geographic location article titles]]. |main category=Redirects from more specific geographic names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
